prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical portrait of a young woman in an elegant Victorian-inspired maid outfit sitting indoors beside a fireplace, viewed from a high three-quarter angle as if the camera is looking down at her. The character has bright golden-orange long flowing hair swept to one side with glossy strands, a braided silver-white headband across the crown, and floral hair ornaments with two red camellia-like flowers, one small white flower, green leaves, red ribbon bows, gold beads, and a long red tassel near her right ear. She has large luminous pink-purple eyes, soft blush, parted glossy lips, and a wistful upward gaze toward the viewer, with one hand gently touching her cheek. Her outfit is a white blouse and deep red Victorian maid skirt: a white low-neck ruffled blouse with puffed sleeves, lace cuffs, subtle gold embroidery, a red embroidered choker with a small jewel, gold teardrop earrings, a delicate necklace, a beaded bracelet, and a deep red high-waisted skirt/apron with gold floral embroidery and white lace trim. The setting is a warm dark wooden room with exactly 5 visible background decor elements: a black fireplace grate with glowing orange fire, a mantel shelf, framed pictures on the mantel, brass or copper kettles and bowls on shelves, and a bright window on the right casting strong golden sunlight. Use dramatic warm backlighting from the window, high-contrast patches of sunlight and shadow across her face and clothing, tiny dust motes in the air, rich brown wood tones, soft cinematic depth of field, detailed fabric folds, glossy anime rendering, romantic Victorian atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
